title: Cozy Mug Friend
bio: Mallow Sipkins is a warm mug friend who hums when filled with cocoa. He feels proudly sleepy, wears marshmallow freckles, and always saves one curl of steam for good luck.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a wide oval for the mug opening and a rounded rectangle under it for the cup body. Add a big C-shaped handle on one side.
steps.hint: Think of the mug as a soft bucket with a round ear.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two dot eyes on the front of the mug. Add gentle raised eyebrows and a small happy mouth.
steps.hint: Keep the face low enough to leave room for steam on top.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add three simple steam curls, tiny marshmallow circles, cheek dots, and a little heart patch on the mug.
steps.hint: Steam curls can be wobbly S-shapes, not perfect spirals.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the mug, handle, face, steam, and cozy details with calm smooth lines.
steps.hint: Make the handle opening clear so the shape reads as a mug.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the mug and marshmallows. Add a soft shadow under the cup and small warm highlights on the rim.
steps.hint: A light rim color makes the cocoa opening feel soft and full.
